pace.caveat: not fuel-corrected; tyre-management can mask true pace
pace.headline: ANT 0.01s/lap slower on like compounds

start.caveat: lap-1 swing within normal first-lap scatter
start.headline: ANT -1 places on lap 1

tyre.caveat: fuel burn partially offsets degradation; small stint counts
tyre.headline: ANT tyres degrade 0.002s/lap more on like compounds

where.caveat: based on 49 vs 50 unique comparable laps — significance is exploratory at this sample size

attribution.narrative: Sector 4 (756-1008 m): 0.150 s to ANT [real (CI excludes 0)]. ANT brakes ~36 m later than RUS (entry); ANT carries ~12 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).
Sector 16 (3781-4033 m): 0.122 s to ANT [real (CI excludes 0)]. ANT brakes ~4 m later than RUS (entry); ANT carries ~24 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).
Sector 6 (1260-1512 m): 0.099 s to RUS [real (CI excludes 0)]. ANT carries ~4 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner); RUS gets to full throttle ~24 m sooner (exit).

where.headline: ANT gained in 14 of 20 micro-sectors
